title: Zustand
summary: Zustand is a small, simple state management library.
It has very little setup compared to Redux.
You create a store and use it directly in components.
It is popular for its ease and small size.

sections.text: Not everyone wants the structure of Redux. Zustand is a lighter alternative, a small library that lets you share state across an app with very little ceremony. It has become popular precisely because it stays out of your way.

sections.title: What Zustand Is
sections.text: Zustand is a small state management library. You create a store, a single place that holds some shared state and the functions to change it, and then any component can use that store directly. There is almost no setup, and the code stays short and readable.

sections.title: Why People Like It
sections.text: Zustand sits between plain Context and full Redux. It gives you a clean shared store without the structure and setup of Redux, but with more power and tidiness than rolling your own with Context. For many apps it hits a sweet spot, simple to learn and pleasant to use.

media.alt: A small store in the middle, between plain Context and full Redux

sections.title: A Single Shared Whiteboard
sections.text: Zustand is like one shared whiteboard in an office. Anyone can walk up, read what is on it, or update it, and everyone sees the change. There is no committee, no forms, just one clear board everyone shares. That simplicity is the whole appeal.

media.alt: One office whiteboard everyone reads and updates freely

sections.title: Using Zustand
items: Create a store with your shared state.
Add functions to the store that change that state.
Use the store directly in any component.
Read values and call the change functions as needed.
Every component using it stays in sync.

sections.text: Zustand means state in German, which is a fitting name for a state library. Many modern libraries pick playful or meaningful names like this.

terms.definition: A small, simple state management library.
A place holding shared state and its change functions.
A package you add to your project.
State many components read and update.
Little setup and short, readable code.
